title: Bridge Paper: Not my future? Core values and the neural representation of future events.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.
**Phase context:** self-transcendence, transcendence, cosmic consciousness, mystical experience, awe

Paper: Not my future? Core values and the neural representation of future events.
DOI: 10.3758/s13415-018-0581-9
Abstract: Individuals with pronounced self-transcendence values have been shown to put greater weight on the long-term consequences of their actions when making decisions. Using functional magnetic resonance imaging, we investigated the neural mechanisms underlying the evaluation of events occurring several decades in the future as well as the role of core values in these processes.
